strengths: Exceeds all required technical skills: TypeScript, Node.js, React, databases, REST APIs, and clean architecture with 15+ years of professional experience
Recently completed full-stack role at re:cinq working with TypeScript, Node.js, and AI infrastructure; demonstrates current technical relevance and engagement with modern tooling
Direct sustainability sector experience through Green Map and GISCollective projects aligns with renewable energy and environmental focus of the role
concerns: Staff/Senior-level background creates severe seniority mismatch with an entry-level position; high risk of rapid departure once boredom or better opportunities emerge
PostgreSQL experience not explicitly mentioned—resume emphasizes MongoDB and SQL broadly, creating a gap against the stated PostgreSQL preference
Recent career gap (Oct 2025–present) combined with apparent downward career move raises questions about motivation and fit for a junior individual contributor role
response.justification: This candidate possesses all required technical skills and relevant domain experience, but is dramatically over-qualified for an entry-level position. A Staff engineer with 15+ years of experience would likely find the junior IC scope unchallenging and unsatisfying, creating significant retention risk. While technically exceptional, the structural mismatch between candidate seniority and role level makes this a poor fit despite skill alignment.
